Internal Legal & Compliance Memorandum — Confidential (SGX-ST / PDPA)
To: Board of Copper Harbor Renewables Ltd.; From: Ms. Deepa Raman, General Counsel; Contact: compliance@copperharbor-renew.com.sg
We have received a non-binding term sheet to acquire 60% of Nimbus Arc Pte. Ltd., a DPT wallet operator with MAS in-principle approval, for S$48m cash plus S$12m earn-out.
Financing assumes a private placement at a 5–8% discount to last 5-day VWAP; such commercial terms and the DPT entry strategy are not generally available and may be price sensitive under Rule 703 of the SGX Listing Manual.
Please add the following to the Project Lantern insider list: Mr. Jian Ho (Corporate Development), Ms. R. Kaye Lim (IR), and Dr. Omar Yew (Non-Executive Director), and circulate wall-cross notices.
Maintain information barriers between the M&A workstream and the treasury/trading functions; no dealing by Designated Persons during the pre-close blackout and until a cleansing announcement is released.
Separately, on 24 May an external vendor, SableByte Cloud Pte. Ltd., reported a ransomware event that may have exposed 1,240 onboarding records (names, emails, and masked NRIC images) relating to our solar subscription customers.
We are assessing PDPA notification thresholds and whether to notify the PDPC within 3 calendar days; do not contact affected individuals or disclose the incident externally pending Legal clearance.
The incident is currently contained with no disruption to operations, and our public cybersecurity training materials use “breach” scenarios only for education without referencing our systems.
ESG note: an internal audit indicates FY2025 Scope 2 emissions may be restated down by approximately 11%, which could trigger a 10 bps margin step-down under our sustainability-linked loan term sheet with Shoreline Bank Asia.
Any reference to the potential emissions restatement, crypto acquisition pipeline, or the placement pricing outside the insider group risks selective disclosure and tipping under Sections 218/219 SFA.
For avoidance of doubt, the standard marketing webinar next week on crypto custody and cyber hygiene is educational and must avoid MNPI; slides should rely solely on publicly announced policies.
If we proceed, target signing is mid-June with long-stop conditions including MAS DPT major payment institution licence confirmation and SGX-ST pre-vetting of the placement circular.
Please confirm acknowledgements of the no-dealing policy, update the insider list upon any wall-crossing, and route all queries to compliance@copperharbor-renew.com.sg for logging.
This memo does not constitute an announcement; a draft SGXNet disclosure is prepared for the Board’s review should materiality thresholds be met.
